name: Suddha Saveri
notes: Janya of Dheerashankarabharanam (29th melakarta); audava raga (5 notes ascending and descending, no Gandhara or Nishada); ārohana S R2 M1 P D2 S, avarohana S D2 P M1 R2 S; evokes serenity and devotion; associated with compositions of Periyasami Tooran and the Tamil devotional repertoire
